body: Can we confirm I'm taking her this weekend like we agreed?
I don't agree that this weekend works.
Let's just talk about this later, I'll get back to you.
On what basis are you assuming you get this weekend?
I'm only trying to protect her, and my lawyer says the schedule stands.
I still don't agree to the swap.
Per the agreement, weekdays are mine.
It's already done - she's staying with me, there's nothing to discuss.
